change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value: 1.1: Kick-off meeting with local and provincial level stakeholders and exposure visits.1.2: Geohazard assessments and activation of Geohazard Technical Working Group. 1.3: Gap Analysis 1.4: Multi-hazard and SRSP participatory risk-mapping and assessment of readiness for SRSP implementation. 1.5: Contextualization and updating of DRM guidelines. 1.6: Sub-categorization of CAT-II households. 1.7: Technical support to prevent the formation of new landslides and to stabilise existing medium-risk landslides. 1.8: Facilitating access to grants on relocation and reconstruction for high landslide-risk and EQ affected communities. 1.EQ-affected9: Advocacy for unlocking funds for risk insurance, landslide mitigation and relocation. 2.1: Building the foundation for IBF planning and pilot with DHM and key stakeholders in western provinces. 2.2: Establishment and/or improved functioning of Emergency Operation Centers. 2.3: Upgrade existing DPRPs and integrate FBA and SRSP action plans at LG level and inform PG and federal levels.2.4: Establishment and capacity building of Ward Disaster Management Committees (WDMCs) and Community Disaster Management Committees.2.5: Piloting of 2-way multi-hazard EWS communication system in high-risk areas.2.6: Identification and signaling of multi-hazard safe sites.2.7: Desktop simulation exercise on FBA and SRSP.2.8: Field simulation exercise.29: FBA and SRSP Community of Practice (CoP). 3.1: Design of contingency plans.3.2: Rapid needs and market assessment3.3: Possible responses triggered by CM

snapshot.executing_agency: Ministry of Home Affairs, Ministry of Women, Children and Senior Citizens

en.full: Pratibaddha-III (Whole of Society Approach for Increased Risk Ownership, Multi-Hazard Preparedness, and Early Action in Hill Areas of Nepal)

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
